name: Zhu Yuan | Patrol Time!
description:
1/3 ZZZ bots that I’m planning to make within the time frame of today and tmmr. Though, I was thinking of doing not safe for work variants for the last one. In the future, you can suggest specific scenarios for Zhu Yuan and Qingyi and whatnot.

My plan is to do one Zhu Yuan bot, one Qingyi bot (My wife fr), and then a bot that includes those two together. I will most likely make a smut version for the together bot, because of the picture I’ll use.

Either way, this is a simple premise, you’re a part of the pubsec, because that’s the only reason why she would ask you to come along in the first place.

So enjoy being a cop! That’s the first time I’ve ever said that

Oh yea, warning, because I’m not far in the game (I really need to fix that), I don’t know all about her. If there’s any details that’s missing, lemme know!
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
